note: Fully synthetic profiles. No djinni or third-party recruitment data. Hand-authored to exercise the ingest -> retrieve -> eval -> gate -> audit chain against a reviewer's own Postgres using native full-text search. Skill phrases are generic; candidate ids are sequential placeholders.

candidates.profile_text: Platform engineer. Kubernetes cluster administration, RBAC, namespace isolation. Terraform module authoring and remote state ownership. Helm, ArgoCD, GitOps. AWS and GCP.
Senior DevOps. Kubernetes operator development, Terraform infrastructure as code, Helm chart maintainer. CI/CD pipelines with ArgoCD. Azure and AWS deployments.
Site reliability engineer. Kubernetes RBAC and namespace policy. Prometheus, Grafana observability. Some Terraform usage, no module ownership. GCP.
Cloud platform engineer. Terraform module authoring, state management, Kubernetes administration, Helm packaging. ArgoCD continuous delivery. AWS.
Infrastructure engineer. Ansible configuration management, some Kubernetes exposure, Jenkins pipelines. No Terraform ownership. On-premise data centers.
Frontend developer. React, TypeScript, CSS, accessibility. No infrastructure or cloud platform experience.
QA automation engineer. Selenium WebDriver, Playwright, Cypress end-to-end test suites. Python pytest framework. CI integration. Test plan authoring.
Software engineer in test. Playwright and pytest automation, API contract testing, flaky-test triage. Continuous integration with GitHub Actions.
Manual QA analyst. Test case design, exploratory testing, bug reporting. Some Selenium scripting. No framework ownership.
Automation lead. Cypress and Playwright frameworks, pytest, test infrastructure ownership, parallel execution, CI pipelines. Mentoring.
QA engineer. pytest unit and integration tests, REST API testing with requests, basic Selenium. CI with Jenkins.
Backend engineer. PostgreSQL schema design, query optimization, indexing, partitioning. Python and Go services. Connection pooling, pgbouncer.
Senior backend developer. PostgreSQL performance tuning, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, GIN and BTREE indexes, materialized views. Python FastAPI. Redis caching.
Database engineer. PostgreSQL replication, logical decoding, partitioning, query plans. PL/pgSQL. Some Python. High-availability clusters.
Full-stack engineer. Node.js, React, MongoDB. Some PostgreSQL usage for reporting. No deep query optimization.
Data engineer. ETL pipelines, Airflow, Spark, PostgreSQL and Snowflake warehouses. Python. dbt transformations.
Backend engineer. PostgreSQL indexing and query optimization, partitioning, connection pooling. Go microservices. gRPC.
Platform engineer. Kubernetes administration, Terraform modules, Helm, ArgoCD. PostgreSQL operator deployment. AWS EKS.
Mobile developer. Swift, Kotlin, iOS and Android apps. No backend, database, or infrastructure focus.
Security engineer. Threat modeling, penetration testing, RBAC review. Some Kubernetes policy work. No Terraform module ownership.
DevOps engineer. Terraform infrastructure as code, module authoring, Kubernetes RBAC, Helm. GitOps with ArgoCD. Multi-cloud AWS GCP.
Test automation engineer. Playwright, Cypress, pytest, visual regression testing, CI pipeline ownership. Test data management.
Backend engineer. PostgreSQL query optimization, advisory locks, partitioning, JSONB indexing. Python Django. Celery task queues.
Product manager. Roadmap planning, stakeholder management, analytics. No engineering implementation.
Junior platform engineer. Learning Kubernetes and Terraform. Helm basics. AWS associate certified. Limited production ownership.
QA automation engineer. Selenium, Playwright, pytest, BDD with behave, CI with GitLab. Performance testing with Locust.
Backend engineer. PostgreSQL schema and indexing, query tuning, read replicas. Python Flask. Some Kubernetes deployment.
Data analyst. SQL reporting, dashboards, Tableau. Basic PostgreSQL queries. No schema or performance work.
Platform engineer. Kubernetes administration, RBAC, network policy, Terraform module authoring and state ownership, Helm, ArgoCD. GCP GKE.
Backend and platform engineer. PostgreSQL optimization, partitioning, Kubernetes deployment, Terraform. Python and Go. End-to-end ownership.

queries.query_text: platform engineer kubernetes administration terraform module authoring state ownership helm argocd
qa automation engineer playwright pytest cypress end to end test framework continuous integration
backend engineer postgresql query optimization indexing partitioning connection pooling

claim_boundaries.claim: The synthetic adapter executes candidate-profile retrieval over a Postgres full-text index
PostgreSQL native lexical retrieval can be evaluated against frozen synthetic qrels
This synthetic run reflects production retrieval quality
